channel.title: Blogs on Fronkon Games
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Fronkon Games

item.title: Awesome GameDev
item.description: To add, remove or change things on the list, please send me a email with the request.

item.title: Design Patterns In Game Development
item.description: The solution is reusable and can be used to solve similar problems.

item.title: Introduction to Go
item.description: Go is a very old strategy game that consists of capturing pieces and winning territories.
